raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint regarding Citi 's handling of a disputed credit card transaction. 

In XX/XX/year>, I purchased two computers through XXXX for approximately {$940.00} each. When the package arrived, it contained only one computer, despite my payment for two. 

I immediately contacted XXXX. During multiple conversations, XXXX provided inconsistent explanations. Initially, I was told that the computers would be shipped separately and that I should wait for the second shipment. Later, XXXX stated that both computers had been shipped together in a single package. XXXX ultimately failed to resolve the issue and advised me to dispute the charge with my credit card issuer. 

I then filed a dispute with Citi. During the investigation, XXXX provided tracking information and claimed that the shipment weight was consistent with two computers being delivered. Based largely on that information, Citi denied my dispute.

I appealed and requested additional review multiple times. However, Citi continued to uphold the merchant 's position. At no point was I provided with evidence proving that two computers were actually delivered to me. The investigation appeared to rely primarily on shipping records and package weight rather than addressing the fundamental issue that I physically received only one computer.

I understand that Citi must consider information provided by the merchant. However, I believe Citi failed to conduct a fair and reasonable investigation of my claim. The fact that a package was shipped with a certain recorded weight does not conclusively establish that both purchased items were received by the customer.

As a result, I have been left responsible for approximately {$940.00} for a computer that I never received. Despite repeated efforts with both XXXX and Citi, neither party has provided a satisfactory resolution. 

I am requesting that Citi reopen and conduct a thorough review of this dispute, taking into consideration the complete circumstances of the case rather than relying solely on the merchant 's shipping records. I am seeking reimbursement for the value of the computer that was paid for but never received. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
